name: brewery
summary: A working brewery with mash tuns, copper kettles over firepits, fermentation vats, and a cellar wall of racked kegs. Steam, yeast smell, and the soft sour tang of wort.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: wide rectangle, flow from mash to ferment to storage

accent.purpose: wet stone around the kettles and drains

primary_palette.note: twin-kettle — a large operation running two batches in parallel
ferment-focused — a specialty brewery aging at scale

story_prompts: brew day — kettles boiling, mash being stirred, brewer calling out timings
contamination panic — a vat gone sour, brewer furious, apprentice in tears
festival prep — every keg full, labelled for tomorrow's delivery
midnight theft — brewer asleep upstairs, shadowy figure tapping a keg

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: warm steamy working light (0.4) with firepit glow under kettles

anti_patterns: flow must go mash → boil → ferment → store — don't scatter the stages
fires belong under or beside kettles, never under fermentation vats
kegs stack along walls — never free-standing in the working floor
